'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: create table lab_requests ( id uuid not null, lab_order_id uuid, order_status varchar(20), requested_at timestamp(6) not null, test_id uuid not null, test_name varchar(255) not null, urgency varchar(20) not null, session_id uuid not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table prescriptions ( id uuid not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, dosage varchar(100) not null, duration_days integer not null, frequency varchar(100) not null, instructions TEXT, medicine_name varchar(200) not null, pharmacy_name varchar(255), status varchar(20) not null, type varchar(20) not null, session_id uuid not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table session_images ( id uuid not null, caption TEXT, file_url TEXT not null, image_type varchar(20) not null, uploaded_at timestamp(6) not null, session_id uuid not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table sessions ( id uuid not null, appointment_id uuid, chief_complaint TEXT, completed_at timestamp(6), created_at timestamp(6) not null, diagnosis TEXT, discount_percent float(53), discount_reason TEXT, doctor_id uuid not null, doctor_name varchar(255) not null, follow_up_date date, notes TEXT, nurse_id uuid, patient_id uuid not null, patient_name varchar(255) not null, session_type varchar(20) not null, status varchar(20) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table vitals ( id uuid not null, blood_pressure_dia integer, blood_pressure_sys integer, blood_sugar float(53), bpm integer, height_cm integer, recorded_at timestamp(6) not null, spo2 integer, temperature float(53), weight_kg float(53), session_id uuid not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists vitals drop constraint if exists testcase.name: listSessions_shouldReturn200
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.appointment_id, s1_0.chief_complaint, s1_0.completed_at, s1_0.created_at, s1_0.diagnosis, s1_0.discount_percent, s1_0.discount_reason, s1_0.doctor_id, s1_0.doctor_name, s1_0.follow_up_date, s1_0.notes, s1_0.nurse_id, s1_0.patient_id, s1_0.patient_name, s1_0.session_type, s1_0.status from sessions s1_0 where 1=1 order by s1_0.created_at desc offset ? rows fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select v1_0.id, v1_0.blood_pressure_dia, v1_0.blood_pressure_sys, v1_0.blood_sugar, v1_0.bpm, v1_0.height_cm, v1_0.recorded_at, v1_0.session_id, v1_0.spo2, v1_0.temperature, v1_0.weight_kg from vitals v1_0 where v1_0.session_id=? Hibernate: select p1_0.session_id, p1_0.id, p1_0.created_at, p1_0.dosage, p1_0.duration_days, p1_0.frequency, p1_0.instructions, p1_0.medicine_name, p1_0.pharmacy_name, p1_0.status, p1_0.type from prescriptions p1_0 where p1_0.session_id=? Hibernate: select i1_0.session_id, i1_0.id, i1_0.caption, i1_0.file_url, i1_0.image_type, i1_0.uploaded_at from session_images i1_0 where i1_0.session_id=? Hibernate: select lr1_0.session_id, lr1_0.id, lr1_0.lab_order_id, lr1_0.order_status, lr1_0.requested_at, lr1_0.test_id, lr1_0.test_name, lr1_0.urgency from lab_requests lr1_0 where lr1_0.session_id=?

testcase.name: recordVitals_shouldReturn201

testcase.name: getPharmacyQueue_shouldReturn200
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select p1_0.id, p1_0.created_at, p1_0.dosage, p1_0.duration_days, p1_0.frequency, p1_0.instructions, p1_0.medicine_name, p1_0.pharmacy_name, p1_0.session_id, p1_0.status, p1_0.type from prescriptions p1_0 where p1_0.type='internal' and p1_0.status=? order by p1_0.created_at Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.appointment_id, s1_0.chief_complaint, s1_0.completed_at, s1_0.created_at, s1_0.diagnosis, s1_0.discount_percent, s1_0.discount_reason, s1_0.doctor_id, s1_0.doctor_name, s1_0.follow_up_date, s1_0.notes, s1_0.nurse_id, s1_0.patient_id, s1_0.patient_name, s1_0.session_type, s1_0.status from sessions s1_0 where s1_0.id=? Hibernate: select v1_0.id, v1_0.blood_pressure_dia, v1_0.blood_pressure_sys, v1_0.blood_sugar, v1_0.bpm, v1_0.height_cm, v1_0.recorded_at, v1_0.session_id, v1_0.spo2, v1_0.temperature, v1_0.weight_kg from vitals v1_0 where v1_0.session_id=?

testcase.name: dispensePrescription_shouldReturn200
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select p1_0.id, p1_0.created_at, p1_0.dosage, p1_0.duration_days, p1_0.frequency, p1_0.instructions, p1_0.medicine_name, p1_0.pharmacy_name, p1_0.session_id, p1_0.status, p1_0.type from prescriptions p1_0 where p1_0.id=? Hibernate: update prescriptions set dosage=?, duration_days=?, frequency=?, instructions=?, medicine_name=?, pharmacy_name=?, session_id=?, status=?, type=? where id=?

testcase.name: dispensePrescription_alreadyDispensed_shouldReturn422

testcase.name: createLabRequests_shouldReturn201
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.appointment_id, s1_0.chief_complaint, s1_0.completed_at, s1_0.created_at, s1_0.diagnosis, s1_0.discount_percent, s1_0.discount_reason, s1_0.doctor_id, s1_0.doctor_name, s1_0.follow_up_date, s1_0.notes, s1_0.nurse_id, s1_0.patient_id, s1_0.patient_name, s1_0.session_type, s1_0.status from sessions s1_0 where s1_0.id=? Hibernate: select v1_0.id, v1_0.blood_pressure_dia, v1_0.blood_pressure_sys, v1_0.blood_sugar, v1_0.bpm, v1_0.height_cm, v1_0.recorded_at, v1_0.session_id, v1_0.spo2, v1_0.temperature, v1_0.weight_kg from vitals v1_0 where v1_0.session_id=? 2026-02-23T18:08:59.398+05:30 INFO 1000488 --- [clinical-service] [ main] com.hms.clinical.event.EventPublisher : Publishing lab.requested event for session: 6e475838-f02e-4ec7-85ca-4a094cb0f397 2026-02-23T18:08:59.424+05:30 INFO 1000488 --- [clinical-service] [ main] o.s.a.r.c.CachingConnectionFactory : Attempting to connect to: [localhost:32788] 2026-02-23T18:08:59.486+05:30 INFO 1000488 --- [clinical-service] [ main] o.s.a.r.c.CachingConnectionFactory : Created new connection: rabbitConnectionFactory#3868c92e:0/SimpleConnection@4c046a12 [delegate=amqp://guest@127.0.0.1:32788/, localPort=39342] Hibernate: insert into lab_requests (lab_order_id, order_status, requested_at, session_id, test_id, test_name, urgency, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into lab_requests (lab_order_id, order_status, requested_at, session_id, test_id, test_name, urgency, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

testcase.name: getLabRequests_shouldReturn200
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select lr1_0.id, lr1_0.lab_order_id, lr1_0.order_status, lr1_0.requested_at, lr1_0.session_id, lr1_0.test_id, lr1_0.test_name, lr1_0.urgency from lab_requests lr1_0 left join sessions s1_0 on s1_0.id=lr1_0.session_id where s1_0.id=?

testcase.name: completeSession_shouldReturn200AndPublishEvent
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.appointment_id, s1_0.chief_complaint, s1_0.completed_at, s1_0.created_at, s1_0.diagnosis, s1_0.discount_percent, s1_0.discount_reason, s1_0.doctor_id, s1_0.doctor_name, s1_0.follow_up_date, s1_0.notes, s1_0.nurse_id, s1_0.patient_id, s1_0.patient_name, s1_0.session_type, s1_0.status from sessions s1_0 where s1_0.id=? Hibernate: select v1_0.id, v1_0.blood_pressure_dia, v1_0.blood_pressure_sys, v1_0.blood_sugar, v1_0.bpm, v1_0.height_cm, v1_0.recorded_at, v1_0.session_id, v1_0.spo2, v1_0.temperature, v1_0.weight_kg from vitals v1_0 where v1_0.session_id=? 2026-02-23T18:08:59.622+05:30 INFO 1000488 --- [clinical-service] [ main] com.hms.clinical.event.EventPublisher : Publishing billing.opd event for session: 6e475838-f02e-4ec7-85ca-4a094cb0f397 Hibernate: select p1_0.session_id, p1_0.id, p1_0.created_at, p1_0.dosage, p1_0.duration_days, p1_0.frequency, p1_0.instructions, p1_0.medicine_name, p1_0.pharmacy_name, p1_0.status, p1_0.type from prescriptions p1_0 where p1_0.session_id=? Hibernate: select i1_0.session_id, i1_0.id, i1_0.caption, i1_0.file_url, i1_0.image_type, i1_0.uploaded_at from session_images i1_0 where i1_0.session_id=? Hibernate: select lr1_0.session_id, lr1_0.id, lr1_0.lab_order_id, lr1_0.order_status, lr1_0.requested_at, lr1_0.test_id, lr1_0.test_name, lr1_0.urgency from lab_requests lr1_0 where lr1_0.session_id=? Hibernate: update sessions set appointment_id=?, chief_complaint=?, completed_at=?, diagnosis=?, discount_percent=?, discount_reason=?, doctor_id=?, doctor_name=?, follow_up_date=?, notes=?, nurse_id=?, patient_id=?, patient_name=?, session_type=?, status=? where id=?

testcase.name: getPatientHistory_shouldReturn200
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.appointment_id, s1_0.chief_complaint, s1_0.completed_at, s1_0.created_at, s1_0.diagnosis, s1_0.discount_percent, s1_0.discount_reason, s1_0.doctor_id, s1_0.doctor_name, s1_0.follow_up_date, s1_0.notes, s1_0.nurse_id, s1_0.patient_id, s1_0.patient_name, s1_0.session_type, s1_0.status from sessions s1_0 where s1_0.id=? Hibernate: select v1_0.id, v1_0.blood_pressure_dia, v1_0.blood_pressure_sys, v1_0.blood_sugar, v1_0.bpm, v1_0.height_cm, v1_0.recorded_at, v1_0.session_id, v1_0.spo2, v1_0.temperature, v1_0.weight_kg from vitals v1_0 where v1_0.session_id=? Hibernate: select p1_0.session_id, p1_0.id, p1_0.created_at, p1_0.dosage, p1_0.duration_days, p1_0.frequency, p1_0.instructions, p1_0.medicine_name, p1_0.pharmacy_name, p1_0.status, p1_0.type from prescriptions p1_0 where p1_0.session_id=? Hibernate: select i1_0.session_id, i1_0.id, i1_0.caption, i1_0.file_url, i1_0.image_type, i1_0.uploaded_at from session_images i1_0 where i1_0.session_id=? Hibernate: select lr1_0.session_id, lr1_0.id, lr1_0.lab_order_id, lr1_0.order_status, lr1_0.requested_at, lr1_0.test_id, lr1_0.test_name, lr1_0.urgency from lab_requests lr1_0 where lr1_0.session_id=? Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.appointment_id, s1_0.chief_complaint, s1_0.completed_at, s1_0.created_at, s1_0.diagnosis, s1_0.discount_percent, s1_0.discount_reason, s1_0.doctor_id, s1_0.doctor_name, s1_0.follow_up_date, s1_0.notes, s1_0.nurse_id, s1_0.patient_id, s1_0.patient_name, s1_0.session_type, s1_0.status from sessions s1_0 where s1_0.patient_id=? order by s1_0.created_at desc offset ? rows fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select v1_0.id, v1_0.blood_pressure_dia, v1_0.blood_pressure_sys, v1_0.blood_sugar, v1_0.bpm, v1_0.height_cm, v1_0.recorded_at, v1_0.session_id, v1_0.spo2, v1_0.temperature, v1_0.weight_kg from vitals v1_0 where v1_0.session_id=? Hibernate: select p1_0.session_id, p1_0.id, p1_0.created_at, p1_0.dosage, p1_0.duration_days, p1_0.frequency, p1_0.instructions, p1_0.medicine_name, p1_0.pharmacy_name, p1_0.status, p1_0.type from prescriptions p1_0 where p1_0.session_id=? Hibernate: select i1_0.session_id, i1_0.id, i1_0.caption, i1_0.file_url, i1_0.image_type, i1_0.uploaded_at from session_images i1_0 where i1_0.session_id=? Hibernate: select lr1_0.session_id, lr1_0.id, lr1_0.lab_order_id, lr1_0.order_status, lr1_0.requested_at, lr1_0.test_id, lr1_0.test_name, lr1_0.urgency from lab_requests lr1_0 where lr1_0.session_id=? Hibernate: select v1_0.id, v1_0.blood_pressure_dia, v1_0.blood_pressure_sys, v1_0.blood_sugar, v1_0.bpm, v1_0.height_cm, v1_0.recorded_at, v1_0.session_id, v1_0.spo2, v1_0.temperature, v1_0.weight_kg from vitals v1_0 left join sessions s1_0 on s1_0.id=v1_0.session_id where s1_0.patient_id=? and v1_0.recorded_at between ? and ? order by v1_0.recorded_at desc

testcase.name: completeSession_missingDiagnosis_shouldReturn400
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into sessions (appointment_id, chief_complaint, completed_at, created_at, diagnosis, discount_percent, discount_reason, doctor_id, doctor_name, follow_up_date, notes, nurse_id, patient_id, patient_name, session_type, status, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
